tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceCreateEnvironmentEC2.createEnvironmentEC2
tools.description: Creates an Cloud9 development environment, launches an Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) instance, and then connects from the instance to the environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceCreateEnvironmentMembership.createEnvironmentMembership
tools.description: Adds an environment member to an Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceDeleteEnvironment.deleteEnvironment
tools.description: Deletes an Cloud9 development environment. If an Amazon EC2 instance is connected to the environment, also terminates the instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceDeleteEnvironmentMembership.deleteEnvironmentMembership
tools.description: Deletes an environment member from a development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceDescribeEnvironmentMemberships.describeEnvironmentMemberships
tools.description: Gets information about environment members for an Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceDescribeEnvironments.describeEnvironments
tools.description: Gets information about Cloud9 development environments.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceDescribeEnvironmentStatus.describeEnvironmentStatus
tools.description: Gets status information for an Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceListEnvironments.listEnvironments
tools.description: Gets a list of Cloud9 development environment identifiers.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Gets a list of the tags associated with an Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceTagResource.tagResource
tools.description:
Adds tags to an Cloud9 development environment.

Tags that you add to an Cloud9 environment by using this method will NOT be automatically propagated to underlying resources.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Removes tags from an Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceUpdateEnvironment.updateEnvironment
tools.description: Changes the settings of an existing Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: xAmzTargetAwsCloud9WorkspaceManagementServiceUpdateEnvironmentMembership.updateEnvironmentMembership
tools.description: Changes the settings of an existing environment member for an Cloud9 development environment.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
